heading: Applicability of other laws
label: 6434 Applicability of other laws
text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the Commission.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 209 and is classified to .section 206 of Pub. L. 105–292section 6436 of this title
Amendments2022— substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286
